channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Got an Apple computer for Christmas? Here are 6 apps and games to try with that new Mac
item.description: So you woke up on Christmas morning to a new Mac. Perhaps it’s the miraculous M4 Mac mini, or maybe it’s the stunning M4 Pro MacBook Pro complete with the nano texture display.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they’re using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Critical warning from Microsoft: .NET install domains changing
item.description: Users who expected to be able to use the resources of the Azure content delivery network (CDN) from Edgio until November 2025, as previously announced, had a not-so-festive “gift” this week – the CDN is now shutting down on Jan. 15, 2025.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: An online debate over foreign workers in tech shows tensions in Trump's political coalition
item.description: An online spat between factions of Donald Trump’s supporters over immigration and the tech industry has thrown internal divisions in the president-elect’s political movement into public display.
item.dc:creator: Michelle L. Price, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mexico tests cellphone app allowing migrants to send alert if they are about to be detained in US
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico is developing a cellphone app that will allow migrants to warn relatives and local consulates if they think they are about to be detained by the U.S. immigration department, a senior official said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New European retail gig work app trend may influence US market
item.description: Stores such as Urban Outfitters, Lush and Uniqlo are recruiting gig workers in the U.K. to bulk up their stores.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: Roy, Cruz named most active X posters in Congress: Report
item.description: Rep. Chip Roy (R-Texas) and Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) were named the most active posters on the social platform X this year among all lawmakers in Congress, according to a recent report. The Dec.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Japan Airlines was hit by a cyberattack, delaying flights during the year-end holiday season
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japan Airlines said it was hit by a cyberattack Thursday, causing delays to more than 20 domestic flights but the carrier said it was able to stop the onslaught and restore its systems hours later. There was no impact on flight safety, it said.
item.dc:creator: MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Snowy owl rescued from car grille by Minnesota woman who saved another bird hours earlier
item.description: A great gray owl and a snowy owl are being treated by experts after being rescued by a northern Minnesota woman.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Fingerhut, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Banning Chinese-made drones could hurt some Americans
item.description: Russell Hedrick, a North Carolina farmer, flies drones to spray fertilizers on his corn, soybean and wheat fields at a fraction of what it would cost him to use a conventional ground spreader.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Ford to donate $1M, fleet of vehicles to Trump inauguration
item.description: Ford Motor Co. said it will donate $1 million and a small fleet of vehicles for use in President-elect Trump’s inauguration, multiple outlets reported Monday. Ford joins a recent wave of major tech companies that have pledged hefty donations to the incoming president’s inaugural fund.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, The Hill

item.title: Chat with Santa or find out if you are on the naughty list with these tech features
item.description: You can access the new (and limited!) Santa Chat feature through the ChatGPT app by starting a new chat, hitting the live chat button.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: How generative AI could aid Kubernetes operations
item.description: Enterprises often encounter friction using Kubernetes (K8s for short) at scale to orchestrate large swaths of containers, not to mention an escalating number of clusters. And due to its complexity, diagnosing issues within Kubernetes isn’t all that easy.
item.dc:creator: Info World
